sources_audited.note: The Census questionnaire directly classifies landscape architecture, design, planning, consulting, garden design, and golf-course design under 541320 and separately lists maintenance and installation under 561730. It does not establish the estimated 0.80 share of LMM-band firms satisfying the repeat-service lens.

O*NET directly supports the cited occupational tasks, including client coordination, site analysis and inspection, specifications, cost estimates, drawings, and CAD use. It does not measure the NAICS wage-weighted AI exposure, implementation rate, or operator-required demand shares assigned in a, rho, and o.

BLS supports the stated duties, jobsite and office work, licensure, employer distribution, and 3% Landscape Architects employment growth projection for 2024-2034. The occupation spans employers outside 541320, and the page does not directly measure AI exposure, implementation, operator necessity, or five-year constant-quality demand for this NAICS.

The ABS page confirms that the survey collects business-owner characteristics for employer businesses. It supplies no observed 541320 LMM ownership-age distribution or five-year qualifying control-transfer probability, as the packet itself acknowledges.

The Rochester solicitation directly supports an as-needed landscape architecture and planning term engagement, project-level not-to-exceed fees, an hourly-rate schedule, and rates fixed for each individual project's duration. One municipal contract does not establish the national contract mix, benefit-retention fraction q, or operator-required share o.

The BLS table directly reports positive 2024-2034 real-output growth for broader NAICS 541300, from $407.3 billion to $480.1 billion in chained 2017 dollars. It does not isolate 541320 or directly establish the packet's five-year d5 value of 1.04.

caveats: The a bridge uses Landscape Architects occupational tasks rather than a NAICS 541320 staffing-and-wage mix, and neither S2 nor S3 measures AI-susceptible task time; the 0.15-0.40 range is therefore a transparent but judgment-heavy proxy.
The 0.12 five-year transfer probability is an honest estimate without a transaction cohort or owner-age distribution; S4 only establishes that owner-characteristic data are collected.
The q range is inferred from one municipal hourly-rate contract and is not evidence of the national mix of hourly, fixed-fee, and hybrid revenue or of realized customer sharing.

The d5 bridge combines a broader-industry real-output projection with an occupation-level employment projection; neither source directly measures five-year constant-price, constant-quality demand for NAICS 541320.

The source-backed limitations and all material estimates are disclosed, the default lens is coherent, construct assignments are not reversed or double-counted, and none of the identified source gaps meets the literal materiality test: correcting or downgrading its evidence state would not change the LOW_PRIORITY base tier or the MODEL_CONDITIONED/VALIDATE_ASSUMPTIONS action.
summary: Publishable with caveats. All six cited sources are reachable and support the qualitative facts used in the registered bridges, but none directly validates the principal numeric estimates. The record labels those transformations as PROXY or ESTIMATE, states the population mismatches and likely error directions, uses a coherent disclosed lens, and keeps the action at VALIDATE_ASSUMPTIONS. No unsupported or misclassified input was found whose correction or evidence-state downgrade would change the base tier or action category.
